name: sucrose
description: Provides sweetness and enhances flavor in food products.
raw_text: Sucrose (Explained + Products) Products Ingredients Decode INCI Login Register Login Register Products Ingredients Decode INCI Follow us on our new Insta page » Sucrose goodie What-it-does: soothing , moisturizer/humectant Official CosIng Information All Functions: humectant, skin conditioning, soothing CAS #: 57-50-1 | EC #: 200-334-9 Chemical/IUPAC Name: Sucrose Details A type fo sugar , usually refined from cane or beet sugar. On the skin, it has water-binding properties and helps to keep your skin hydrated . [more] [more] [less] Something incorrect or missing? Let us know!
